hero.title: <1>Surf</1> and <1>Snorkeling</1> school and expeditions
hero.subtitle: Your unforgettable surf and snorkeling adventure starts here. Explore perfect waves and spectacular underwater worlds.
hero.altImage: Aerial view of Lombok beach with perfect waves for surfing

surfSection.title: <1>Surf</1> Lessons
surfSection.intro: Whether you're a beginner or an experienced surfer, our instructors will help you catch the best waves in Lombok.
surfSection.beginnerDesc: Learn the basics of surfing in a safe and fun environment. Ideal for your first gliding sensations.
surfSection.intermediateDesc: Perfect your technique, learn to read waves, and maneuver on the board.
surfSection.advancedDesc: For experienced surfers looking to improve their style, maneuvers, and explore the best spots.
surfSection.instructorsDesc: Our instructors are passionate and experienced to ensure quality learning.
surfSection.smallGroupsDesc: We favor small group lessons for personalized attention and rapid progress.
surfSection.qualityEquipmentDesc: We provide boards suited to your level and wetsuits for your comfort.
surfSection.altBeginnerCourse: Surf instructor helping a beginner on a Lombok beach
surfSection.altIntermediateCourse: Intermediate surfer catching a wave in Lombok
surfSection.altAdvancedCourse: Advanced surfer performing a maneuver on a wave in Lombok
surfSection.altInstructorGroup: Surf instructor teaching a group on Lombok beach

snorkelingSection.title: <1>Snorkeling</1> Trips
snorkelingSection.intro: Dive into the crystal-clear waters of Lombok and discover breathtaking marine life. Our guides will take you to the most beautiful sites.
snorkelingSection.reefDiscoveryDesc: Explore colorful coral gardens and a multitude of tropical fish. Accessible to everyone.
snorkelingSection.seaTurtlesDesc: A magical experience encountering sea turtles in their natural habitat.
snorkelingSection.wreckExplorationDesc: Venture to shallow wreck sites, home to diverse marine fauna and flora.
snorkelingSection.experienceDesc: Lombok is renowned for its world-class snorkeling spots. Let yourself be amazed by the beauty of the seabed.
snorkelingSection.exceptionalBiodiversityDesc: Observe a wide variety of marine species, from vibrant corals to pelagic creatures.
snorkelingSection.experiencedGuidesDesc: Our local guides know the best spots and ensure your safety and enjoyment.
snorkelingSection.equipmentProvidedDesc: We provide quality masks, snorkels, and fins for comfortable exploration.
snorkelingSection.altReefDiscovery: Snorkeler exploring a colorful coral reef in Lombok
snorkelingSection.altSeaTurtles: Person swimming with a sea turtle in Lombok
snorkelingSection.altWreckExploration: Diver exploring an underwater wreck in Lombok
snorkelingSection.altUnderwaterReef: Underwater view of a colorful coral reef in Lombok with tropical fish

aboutSection.title: Our <1>Story</1>
aboutSection.intro: Born from a deep passion for the ocean and the enchanting island of Lombok, we founded our school with a dream: to share the thrill of surfing and the magic of snorkeling with the world.
aboutSection.ourStoryTitle: Our Tale: Waves, Dreams, and Adventures
aboutSection.ourStoryP1: It all started with a few worn-out boards, an intimate knowledge of the local ocean's secrets, and a burning desire to pass on our love for Lombok's waves. We are a team of locals, raised by the rhythm of the tides, who have turned their passion into a vocation: guiding you through the aquatic wonders of our island.
aboutSection.ourStoryP2: Over the years, our small initiative has grown into a true family, welcoming travelers from all walks of life. We have refined our teaching techniques, explored every nook and cranny of the coral reefs, and built strong relationships with the local community, which is at the heart of everything we do.
aboutSection.ourStoryP3: Today, Lombok Surf & Snorkeling is more than just a school. It's a gateway to authentic adventure, a promise of unforgettable experiences, and a commitment to preserving the natural beauty that surrounds us. Join us and write your own chapter in Lombok's story.
aboutSection.idealLocationDesc: Located on the most beautiful beaches, direct access to the best spots.
aboutSection.passionateTeamDesc: Local instructors, experts, and dedicated to your enjoyment.
aboutSection.authenticExperienceDesc: Immersion in local culture and respect for the environment.
aboutSection.lombokDescription: Lombok, an island of many facets, offers much more than perfect waves. From pristine white sandy beaches to majestic waterfalls nestled in lush jungles, and the warm smiles of its inhabitants, Lombok is an invitation to escape and discover.
aboutSection.lombokFeature2: Preserved snorkeling sites rich in biodiversity
aboutSection.lombokFeature5: Less crowded than its neighbor Bali, for a more peaceful experience
aboutSection.altTeam: The Lombok Surf & Snorkeling team smiling on the beach with surfboards
aboutSection.altLombokView: Panoramic view of Lombok island with its white sandy beaches and green mountains

pricingSection.title: Our <1>Packages</1>
pricingSection.intro: Choose the package that suits you and get ready for an unforgettable adventure. Transparent prices, no hidden fees.
pricingSection.surfCourseDesc: Learn to surf or improve your technique.
pricingSection.discoveryPackDesc: The ultimate experience: surf and snorkel.
pricingSection.groupOfferDesc: We offer special rates for groups, families, and custom stays. Contact us for a tailor-made quote!

testimonialsSection.title: What Our <1>Clients Say</1>
testimonialsSection.intro: Our customers' satisfaction is our greatest reward. Discover their experiences with Lombok Surf.
testimonialsSection.sophieQuote: An incredible experience! The instructors were super patient and helped me catch my first waves. Lombok is beautiful!
testimonialsSection.thomasQuote: The best snorkeling of my life! Colorful corals, turtles... The team was professional and very friendly. I highly recommend it.
testimonialsSection.emmaQuote: I loved my advanced surf lesson. The spots were perfect and the instructor's advice really helped me progress. Thanks Lombok Surf!
testimonialsSection.hiroshiQuote: Very good organization for the snorkeling tour. The equipment was good quality and the guide knew the places very well.
testimonialsSection.averageRatingInfo: Our customers love us on Google and TripAdvisor!
testimonialsSection.altSophie: Portrait of Sophie Martin, satisfied customer
testimonialsSection.altThomas: Portrait of Thomas Weber, satisfied customer
testimonialsSection.altEmma: Portrait of Emma Johnson, satisfied customer
testimonialsSection.altHiroshi: Portrait of Hiroshi Tanaka, satisfied customer

contactSection.intro: Have a question? Want to book your next adventure? Don't hesitate to contact us, we'll be happy to help.
contactSection.addressValue: Mangsit, Senggigi, Kec. Batu Layar, Kabupaten Lombok Barat, Nusa Tenggara Bar., Indonesia
contactSection.subject: Subject
contactSection.messageSentDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
